pageHero.label: Our Services
pageHero.heading: Complete Dermatological Solutions
pageHero.subtext: From medical treatments to cosmetic enhancements, we offer comprehensive care for all your skin needs.

medical.heading: Medical Dermatology
medical.subtext: Expert diagnosis and treatment of skin conditions with evidence-based medicine.

services.title: Acne Treatment
services.description: Comprehensive acne management using prescription medications, chemical peels, and laser therapy. We create customized treatment plans for mild to severe acne, addressing both active breakouts and scarring.

services.title: Eczema & Psoriasis Care
services.description: Advanced treatment options for chronic skin conditions including topical therapies, phototherapy, and biologic medications. Our goal is to control symptoms and improve your quality of life.

services.title: Skin Cancer Screening
services.description: Thorough full-body skin examinations using dermoscopy and digital imaging. Early detection saves lives, and our expertise ensures accurate diagnosis and appropriate treatment planning.

services.title: Rosacea Management
services.description: Specialized care for rosacea including trigger identification, prescription medications, and laser treatments to reduce redness and visible blood vessels while preventing flare-ups.

cosmetic.heading: Cosmetic Dermatology
cosmetic.subtext: Aesthetic treatments to enhance your natural beauty and restore youthful radiance.

services.title: Botox & Fillers
services.description: Expert injectable treatments to smooth wrinkles, restore volume, and create natural-looking facial rejuvenation. Our artistic approach ensures balanced, subtle results that enhance your features.

services.title: Chemical Peels
services.description: Medical-grade chemical peels to improve skin texture, reduce fine lines, fade hyperpigmentation, and reveal brighter, smoother skin. Available in various strengths for different concerns.

services.title: Laser Skin Resurfacing
services.description: Advanced fractional laser technology to treat wrinkles, sun damage, scars, and uneven skin tone. Stimulates collagen production for long-lasting skin rejuvenation with minimal downtime.

services.title: Microneedling
services.description: Collagen induction therapy using medical-grade microneedling to improve skin texture, reduce scarring, and enhance product absorption. Can be combined with PRP for enhanced results.

laser.heading: Laser & Light Therapies
laser.subtext: State-of-the-art laser technology for targeted skin improvements.

treatments.title: Laser Hair Removal
treatments.description: Permanent hair reduction for all skin types using advanced diode laser technology. Safe, effective, and FDA-cleared for long-lasting results on face and body.

treatments.title: IPL Photofacial
treatments.description: Intense Pulsed Light therapy to treat sun damage, age spots, redness, and broken capillaries. Improves overall skin tone and texture with no downtime.

treatments.title: Vascular Lesion Treatment
treatments.description: Targeted laser treatment for spider veins, broken capillaries, and cherry angiomas. Quick, comfortable procedures with excellent clearance rates.

treatments.title: Pigmentation Correction
treatments.description: Specialized laser treatment for melasma, sun spots, and post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation. Reveals clearer, more even-toned skin.

consultation.heading: Ready to Get Started?
consultation.text: Schedule a consultation to discuss your skin concerns and discover which treatments are right for you. Our dermatologists will create a personalized plan to help you achieve your goals.

seo.title: Dermatology Services | DermaCare Clinic
seo.description: Comprehensive skin care services including medical dermatology, cosmetic procedures, laser treatments, and skin cancer screening. Expert care from board-certified dermatologists.

openGraph.title: Dermatology Services | DermaCare Clinic
openGraph.description: Comprehensive skin care services from medical to cosmetic dermatology.

twitter.description: Comprehensive skin care services from medical to cosmetic dermatology.
